revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Third-party inline]]": [[WP:SEMI|semi-protecting]] highly-visible templates in response to recent template-space vandalism ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed acc...
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Third-party inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Independent sources | text = third-party source needed | class = noprint Template-Fact | title = {{{reason|This claim needs a reference to a independent, third-party source.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:All articles lacking reliable references]] | cat-date = Category:Articles lacking reliable references }}<!--{{Third-party inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Third-party inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Independent sources | text = third-party source needed | class = noprint Template-Fact | title = {{{reason|This claim needs a reference to a independent, third-party source.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles lacking reliable references }}<!--{{Third-party inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All articles lacking reliable references]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Third-party inline}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Independent sources | text = third-party source needed | class = noprint Template-Fact | title = {{{reason|This claim needs a reference to a independent, third-party source.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles lacking reliable references }}<!--{{Third-party inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All articles lacking reliable references]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
